name: Daohe Global Group Limited
summary: Daohe Global Group Limited, an investment holding company, sells merchandise, and provides procurement and value-added services in Southern Hemisphere, North America, the People's Republic of China, Europe, and internationally. The company also provides laboratory, management, marketing consultancy and product development, software and information technology, and market trend consultancy services; acts as a procurement agent; and develops and operates online social platforms. In addition, it engages in the film production and distribution, and television and related activities. The company was formerly known as Linmark Group Limited and changed its name to Daohe Global Group Limited in June 2015. Daohe Global Group Limited was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
